## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / mechanic

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run smoke:simulation` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run test:multiplayer` passes locally
- [ ] Manually played at least one full game (if rules / UI changed)
- [ ] Re-trained or re-validated affected AI personalities (if AI changed)
